title: Chirakkadavu Sree Mahadeva Temple
tagline: Chirakkadavu Sree Mahadeva Temple — spiritual town of Kerala

overview.short: Chirakkadavu Mahadevar Temple is a Hindu temple located at Chirakkadavu in Kottayam, Kerala and is situated between the Kollam-Theni route of the National Highway 183, about 32 km
overview.description: Chirakkadavu Mahadevar Temple is a Hindu temple located at Chirakkadavu in Kottayam, Kerala and is situated between the Kollam-Theni route of the National Highway 183, about 32 km east of the Akshra Nagari, Kottayam city and 3 km south of Ponkunnam en route to Manimala and Erumely.

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Chirakkadavu
topPlaces.description: Chirakkadavu is a village in Kottayam district in the state of Kerala, India. The nearest town of Chirakkadavu is Kanjirappally.

topPlaces.name: Chenappady
topPlaces.description: Chenappady is a small village on the foothills of the Sahyadri of Kerala, in the banks of Manimala River. It is located under the Kanjirappally locality which is 8 km (5.0 mi) from there.

topPlaces.name: Cheruvally
topPlaces.description: Cheruvally is a village in Chirakkadavu panchayat of Kottayam district in Kerala. It is in Kanjirappally taluk of Kottayam district.

topPlaces.name: Cheruvally Devi Temple
topPlaces.description: The Cheruvally Devi Temple is located in the village of Cheruvally in the Kanjirappally taluk of Kottayam, Kerala state, India. The presiding deity here is Goddess Bhadrakali, a more fierce form of [Devi Aadishakthi.

topPlaces.name: Manakkattu Bhadra Temple
topPlaces.description: Manakkattu Sree Bhadra Temple is a Hindu temple located in Chirakkadavu village near Ponkunnam in Kottayam district in the Indian state of Kerala. Goddess Bhadrakali presides there in the form of "Manakkattuamma".

topPlaces.name: Koovappally
topPlaces.description: Koovappally is a small village under Kanjirappally Taluk in the Kottayam district of Kerala, India. It is best known for its rubber industry.

topPlaces.name: Koorali
topPlaces.description: Koorali is a place situated at Kottayam district of Kerala, India. Panamattom, Elamgulam, Thampalakad, Kanjirappally and Ponkunnam are the nearest places to Koorali.

topPlaces.name: Kanjirappally
topPlaces.description: Kanjirappally is a taluk and a town in Kottayam district situated about 38 km (24 mi) away from the district capital, in the state of Kerala, in southwestern India.

items.note: Chirakkadavu is a village in Kottayam district in the state of Kerala, India. The nearest town of Chirakkadavu is Kanjirappally.

The Cheruvally Devi Temple is located in the village of Cheruvally in the Kanjirappally taluk of Kottayam, Kerala state, India. The presiding deity here is Goddess Bhadrakali, a more fierce form of [Devi Aadishakthi.

Manakkattu Sree Bhadra Temple is a Hindu temple located in Chirakkadavu village near Ponkunnam in Kottayam district in the Indian state of Kerala. Goddess Bhadrakali presides there in the form of "Manakkattuamma".
Koovappally is a small village under Kanjirappally Taluk in the Kottayam district of Kerala, India. It is best known for its rubber industry.
Koorali is a place situated at Kottayam district of Kerala, India. Panamattom, Elamgulam, Thampalakad, Kanjirappally and Ponkunnam are the nearest places to Koorali.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Chirakkadavu Sree Mahadeva Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Chirakkadavu Sree Mahadeva Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Chirakkadavu Sree Mahadeva Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Cochin International Airport, Kochi (82 km) and the nearest railway station is Ernakulam Junction (Kochi) (74 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Chirakkadavu Sree Mahadeva Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Chirakkadavu Sree Mahadeva Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Chirakkadavu Sree Mahadeva Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Chirakkadavu Sree Mahadeva Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Chirakkadavu Sree Mahadeva Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Chirakkadavu, Chenappady, Cheruvally, Cheruvally Devi Temple, Manakkattu Bhadra Temple.
